attempts.strategy: Build P^n_S as pullback over terminal scheme of Proj(homogeneousSubmodule (Fin (n+1)) (ULift ℤ)), mirroring AlgebraicGeometry.AffineSpace
attempts.code_tried: noncomputable def projectiveSpace (n : ℕ) (S : Scheme.{u}) : Scheme.{u} := pullback (terminal.from S) (terminal.from (Proj (homogeneousSubmodule (Fin (n + 1)) (ULift.{u} ℤ))))

next_steps: Add Serre twisting sheaves O(r) on this construction (mathlib-build objective) to support serre_vanishing and the O(1) clause of RelativelyVeryAmple.

next_steps: Once relativeProj + O(1) land, add the `i^* O(1) ≅ L` conjunct to make the definition faithful.

attempts.strategy: Lift the index type to universe u
